pairs.question: When was Christopher McDonald born?
pairs.answer: Christopher McDonald was born on February 15, 1955.

pairs.question: What notable villainous role did Christopher McDonald play in the film Happy Gilmore?
pairs.answer: Christopher McDonald played the role of professional golfer Shooter McGavin, a villainous character in the 1996 sports comedy Happy Gilmore.

pairs.question: Name three films where Christopher McDonald played a starring role.
pairs.answer: Christopher McDonald starred in Grease 2 (1982) as Goose McKenzie, Thelma & Louise (1991) as Darryl Dickinson, and Leave It to Beaver (1997) as Ward Cleaver.

pairs.question: Which HBO Max show earned Christopher McDonald a Primetime Emmy nomination in 2022?
pairs.answer: In 2022, Christopher McDonald was nominated for a Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Guest Actor in a Comedy Series for his role as casino CEO Marty Ghilain on the HBO Max show Hacks.

pairs.question: List two real-life historical figures Christopher McDonald has portrayed on screen.
pairs.answer: Christopher McDonald has portrayed baseball player Joe DiMaggio in ESPN's The Bronx Is Burning (2007) and U.S. Attorney General Harry M. Daugherty on HBO's Boardwalk Empire (2010–2012).

pairs.question: What recurring role did Christopher McDonald have on the TV show Family Law?
pairs.answer: Christopher McDonald was a series regular on the TV show Family Law (1999–2002).

pairs.question: How many films listed in the text feature Christopher McDonald in a supporting role?
pairs.answer: Five films listed in the text feature Christopher McDonald in a supporting role: Grumpy Old Men (1993), Flubber (1997), Rumor Has It (2005), The House Bunny (2008), and About Last Night (2014).
